client = <httpx.AsyncClient object at 0x000001FCF058E650> mock_db = <motor.motor_asyncio.AsyncIOMotorDatabase object at 0x000001FCF058E3F0>
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_admin_delete_student(client: AsyncClient, mock_db): """ Especificación SDD: DELETE /api/v1/admin/students/{student_id} Admin puede eliminar a un alumno. """ from .conftest import seed_student student = await seed_student(mock_db) admin_headers = auth_headers("admin_user_1", role="admin") student_id = str(student["_id"])
resp = await client.delete(f"/api/v1/admin/students/{student_id}", headers=admin_headers) > assert resp.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404 Not Found]>.status_code
tests\test_admin_students.py:86: AssertionError
